title: Eckless

{{Quote|My name is Rusha, and I am the sole ambassador of my homeworld, Eckless. Twenty years ago, when we had no knowledge of the civilizations beyond our skies, our world was invaded by Hahz Fallone. Fallone the Destroyer used his weapons to enslave us. He forced us to mine our lands, drawing from our planet minerals which were of no use to us but were apparently of great importance to him.|Rusha|<ref name="TBS" />}}
'''Eckless''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], considered to be an almost mythical world containing a great wealth of gems and metals.

==Description==
{{Quote|Many years ago, an incompetent fool named Hahz Fallone discovered the coordinates for a lost colony world. His explorations proved that the planet contained great wealth, but Fallone did not have the resources to fully exploit it.|Jorga Sune|<ref name="TBS" />}}
Eckless was a primitive world located in unexplored space, rich in [[Ore/Legends|ores]], [[Mineral/Legends|minerals]], gems, and [[Metal/Legends|metals]]. It was home to a lost colony of [[Human/Legends|humans]].<ref name="TBS" />

==History==
{{Quote|The Black Sphere holds in it the secret of our existence. It shines with the light of our people; it is a part of us. Without it, we are lost forever; if he possesses it, Fallone the Destroyer can return at will to further despoil our home. His touch still poisons our world…the famines linger even though Fallone left over 20 seasons ago.|Rusha|<ref name="TBS" />}}
Eckless and its lost colonial civilization, which had no knowledge of the wider [[galactic community]], were overseen by the planetary [[Council of Eckless]], led by a [[President/Legends|President]]. Its people believed the [[Black Sphere]] was key to their existence. In time, the planet became fabled for its mineral wealth, reaching almost mythical status on other worlds.<ref name="TBS" />

[[Hahz Fallone]] invaded Eckless, enslaving its people to mine their lands for minerals, using a fleet supplied by [[Jorga Sune]]. Fearing the destruction of their world, the natives stole weapons and forced Fallone to depart through strength of numbers, though he raided the planet's treasury and stole the Black Sphere before leaving. Famine lingered for at least twenty seasons after his departure.<ref name="TBS" />

During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|period]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], some twenty years after Fallone's devastation, [[Rusha]] served as diplomatic ambassador of Eckless. She spent a decade searching for Fallone.<ref name="TBS" />
